guide_lib.book.radial_teleport.desc: Crafting and usage for the Teleport Compass
Radial Teleport adds a Teleport Compass
that opens a radial menu for quick travel.
Jump to world spawn or online players
without operator permissions.

Use the table of contents for the compass recipe and usage.
See Getting the Guides for manual and Codex Tablet crafting.
guide_lib.radial_teleport.page.guide_ite:
Craft the Radial Teleport Manual from a book and a compass.
Right-click to open this guide directly
(not via the Codex list).

Craft the Codex Tablet from a written book, redstone, and glass pane.
Opens the tablet UI listing all mod guides
(requires guide_lib).
guide_lib.radial_teleport.page.teleport_:
Hold right-click to open a pizza-slice radial menu.
Select a slice with the mouse and left-click to teleport.
Release right-click to close the menu without moving.

[Usage] Hold the compass in either hand.
Right-click and hold to open the menu.
Hover a slice and left-click to teleport.
You must keep holding right-click until you click a slice.

[Destinations] World spawn uses the world's respawn point
(including its dimension).
Other slices are online players (yourself excluded).
With the Nickname mod, slices show nicknames instead of usernames.
Cross-dimension travel is supported.

[Obtain / Config] Default: craft with ender pearls, compass, and echo shard.
Set enableCraftingRecipe = false in config/radial_teleport-common.toml
to disable crafting (use /radialteleport give instead).
Changes reload datapacks automatically on a running server.
guide_lib.radial_teleport.page.waypoints:
[Save] Hold the compass and press the Waypoint Modifier key
(default: Left Shift) + right-click to open the save screen.
Coordinates are filled in automatically (you can enter any name).

[Edit] Left-click the center hub while the radial menu is open
to open the edit screen. Rename, reorder slices (▲▼), or delete waypoints.

[Key bind] Options → Controls → Radial Teleport
→ "Waypoint Modifier Key" to change the modifier.
[Config] enableWaypoints, maxWaypointsPerPlayer, teleportCooldownTicks
in config/radial_teleport-common.toml or Mods → Radial Teleport → Config.
radial_teleport.message.waypoints_disabl: Waypoints are disabled on this server.
radial_teleport.message.waypoint_save_fa: Could not save waypoint (duplicate name or limit reached).
radial_teleport.message.waypoint_rename_: Could not rename waypoint (name already in use).
radial_teleport.message.not_using_item: Hold the Teleport Compass to teleport.
radial_teleport.message.player_offline: That player is no longer online.
radial_teleport.configuration.title: Radial Teleport Configuration
radial_teleport.configuration.enableCraf: If false, obtain the compass via /radialteleport give or creative mode. Changes reload datapacks on a running server.
radial_teleport.configuration.enableWayp: Allows saving, deleting, and listing waypoints from the compass and radial menu.
radial_teleport.configuration.maxWaypoin: Maximum number of saved personal waypoints (1–32).
radial_teleport.configuration.teleportCo: Minimum ticks between teleports. 20 ticks = 1 second. 0 disables cooldown.
radial_teleport.screen.waypoint_save.nam: Name (coordinates pre-filled; change to any label you like)
radial_teleport.screen.waypoint_edit.hin: Click a row to select. Use ▲▼ to change radial menu order
